name: Optimum Golf
address: 3563 Walnut St Unit B, Denver, CO 80205
about: Optimum Golf is a golf simulator venue that focuses on data-driven coaching and player development. It utilizes indoor golf simulators for lessons, practice, and skill assessment, featuring technology like launch monitors and motion capture. The venue offers structured programs, including student assessments, personalized improvement plans, and connected coaching options to help golfers improve their game. It is suitable for players of all levels looking for a focused training environment with professional instruction and advanced analytical tools.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven coaching system with personalized improvement plans
Advanced technology including Uneekor launch monitors and SportsBox 3D motion capture
Connected Coaching app for continuous feedback between sessions
Professional PGA instruction with a focus on measurable results
Indoor facilities allowing for year-round practice and play

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of on-site food service

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium radar technology tracking ball flight, spin rates, launch angles and smash factor

faq.answer: The content doesn't explicitly state whether they provide club rentals, so it's recommended to contact them directly to confirm if you need to bring your own clubs.

faq.answer: There's no mention of BYOB policies or outside food/drink restrictions in the provided content.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The content doesn't specify a standard time for 18 holes as the venue focuses on coaching and practice rather than casual play.

faq.answer: Yes, the venue appears to be kid-friendly with programs suitable for juniors and youth, and mentions that children can play with members.
